title: sterculia campanulata
intro: Sterculia campanulata, also known as the Cambodian sterculia, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, characterized by its distinctive bell-shaped flowers and large leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its high tannin and saponin content. The health benefits of Sterculia campanulata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and soothe various skin conditions.
